name: Lemon Chicken =20
recipeInstructions:
1. For the marinade, combine the first four ingredients in a small bowl. Rub the mixture over the chicken, allowing excess to drain off. Coat lightly with cornstarch. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
2. For the lemon sauce, combine the first six ingredients in a small saucepan and bring to boil over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally. Add the dissolved cornstarch and stir until slightly thickened. Keep warm.
3. Heat half of the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Fry the chicken until golden brown on both sides. Drain, then cut into 3/4-inch wide strips. Set aside and keep warm.
4. Wipe out the skillet, add a small amount of vegetable oil, and heat over medium-high heat. Add bean sprouts, snow peas, bamboo shoots, and water chestnuts and stir fry until crisp-tender. Transfer to a heated platter.
5. Top with chicken and spoon lemon sauce over. Garnish with tomato wedges, lemon slices, green onion slices, and crushed almonds.
